Security Copilot Automation Part-2 In my last post, I shared a Sentinel + Security Copilot workflow that used a pull model. It worked, but it used a lot of resources and gave only short summaries. So I changed the design. I built a new push-based workflow where &nbsp;&nbsp; LinkedIn
